name: SocialPulse
tagline: Schedule, publish, and analyze across every social platform from one dashboard
metaDescription: SocialPulse replaces Hootsuite with multi-platform scheduling, analytics, inbox management, and content calendars — all included in your AppBuster subscription.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">📱</text></svg>

features.title: Content Calendar
features.desc: Plan your entire social strategy on a visual calendar. Drag posts between dates, color-code by platform, and see your publishing cadence at a glance.

features.title: Smart Scheduling
features.desc: Queue posts for optimal engagement times based on your audience's historical activity patterns. Set it once and let the scheduler handle the rest.

features.title: Unified Inbox
features.desc: Reply to comments, DMs, and mentions from Instagram, Facebook, X, and LinkedIn in a single feed. Never miss an interaction or let a customer wait.

features.title: Cross-Platform Analytics
features.desc: Compare engagement, reach, and follower growth across all connected accounts in one report. Export branded PDFs for client or stakeholder presentations.

features.title: Team Approval Workflow
features.desc: Route drafted posts through a review chain before they go live. Approvers can edit, comment, or reject with a single click to maintain brand consistency.

features.title: Media Library
features.desc: Upload and organize images, videos, and brand assets in a shared library. Tag files for quick search and drag them directly into post drafts.
